text.title: claude-code-headless-default Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for claude-code-headless-default as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Picking the Agent SDK first because "it's the API" or "the CLI looks like a CLI tool, not a runtime."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Re-implements months of harness work; loses MCP/plan-mode/hooks/compaction; adds maintenance burden every time Anthropic ships a CLI improvement.

failure-mode.description: Treating `claude -p` like a one-shot text generator and parsing only the final stdout blob.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Loses the cost/tool/event stream needed for budget enforcement, mid-run hand-off, and safety vetoes.
